name: FctsIdsMbrDntlRwrdAccumExtr

sqlReaderQuery.value: WITH cte_1 AS (SELECT ACCUM.MEME_CK, ACCUM.MERW_CUR_YEAR, ACCUM.MERW_YR1_AMT, ACCUM.MERW_YR1_THRES_AMT, ACCUM.MERW_YR1_RWDCO_AMT, ACCUM.MERW_YR1_BONCO_AMT, ACCUM.MERW_YR1_RWD_AMT, ACCUM.MERW_YR1_BONUS_AMT, ACCUM.MERW_YR1_OON_COUNT, ACCUM.MERW_YR2_AMT, ACCUM.MERW_YR2_THRES_AMT, ACCUM.MERW_YR2_RWDCO_AMT, ACCUM.MERW_YR2_BONCO_AMT, ACCUM.MERW_YR2_RWD_AMT, ACCUM.MERW_YR2_BONUS_AMT, ACCUM.MERW_YR2_OON_COUNT, ACCUM.MERW_YR3_AMT, ACCUM.MERW_YR3_THRES_AMT, ACCUM.MERW_YR3_RWDCO_AMT, ACCUM.MERW_YR3_BONCO_AMT, ACCUM.MERW_YR3_RWD_AMT, ACCUM.MERW_YR3_BONUS_AMT, ACCUM.MERW_YR3_OON_COUNT, ACCUM.MERW_LOCK_TOKEN, ACCUM.ATXR_SOURCE_ID FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_FacetsOwner}.CMC_MERW_RWD_ACCUM ACCUM WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 'Y' FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_BCBSOwner}.P_SEL_PRCS_CRITR P_SEL_PRCS_CRITR, @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_FacetsOwner}.CMC_GRGR_GROUP CMC_GRGR, @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_FacetsOwner}.CMC_MEME_MEMBER CMC_MEME WHERE P_SEL_PRCS_CRITR.SEL_PRCS_ID = 'WRHSINBEXCL' AND P_SEL_PRCS_CRITR.SEL_PRCS_ITEM_ID = 'WORKCOMP' AND P_SEL_PRCS_CRITR.SEL_PRCS_CRITR_CD = 'MEDPROC' AND CMC_GRGR.GRGR_ID >= P_SEL_PRCS_CRITR.CRITR_VAL_FROM_TX AND CMC_GRGR.GRGR_ID <= P_SEL_PRCS_CRITR.CRITR_VAL_THRU_TX AND ACCUM.MEME_CK=CMC_MEME.MEME_CK AND CMC_GRGR.GRGR_CK=CMC_MEME.GRGR_CK)) SELECT * FROM cte_1

JOB NAME:  FctsIdsMbrDntlRwrdAccumExtr
